prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SPYBOLT-DIVSAFE-PARENT Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): IGE Innovative Internet Products Existing Title: Spy Bolt Diversion Safe Hidden Contents Hollow Security Container Description: The Spy Bolt is an updated and improved version of the old Soviet KGB "dead drop" hollow bolt used during the Cold War. It features an O-ring seal for weather-proof storage of small valuables, communications, cash, and more.

The simple, yet ingenious design is essential for the concealable gadgets spy work calls for. Now available to the general public, The Spy Bolt is the ideal product to hide your small valuables.

Please note: This listing is for (1) bolt only. Search Terms: spy bolt secret container nail storage compartment holder containers hiding items Features: - Sizes Available: 2 - Classic (3.5") - Diameter (Sm): .5" - O-Ring Seal - Reverse Threaded === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: IGE Spy Bolt Diversion Safe Hidden Security Container

tokens.name: Spy Bolt Diversion Safe Hidden Security Container

openai.item_name: IGE Innovative Internet Products 3.5-in Diversion Safe Bolt

anthropic.title_differentiation: O-Ring Seal, Weather-Proof, Reverse Threaded, Hollow Bolt Design, Secret Storage

openai.title_differentiation: Hollow Security Container, O-Ring Seal, Weather-Resistant Storage, Reverse Threaded, Hidden Cash And Valuables
